title: AKS Bundle
description: Agent Knowledge Standard v0.1.0 — a portable compiled domain knowledge bundle

aks_version.description: AKS spec version. Consumers use this to validate compatibility before processing a bundle.

domain.description: Lowercase hyphenated slug identifying the knowledge domain.

stack_id.description: Stable UUID for this Knowledge Stack. Does not change across recompilations.

stack_name.description: Human-readable name for this Knowledge Stack.

compiled_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when this bundle was generated.

scope.description: Visibility boundary. stack=private, workspace=org-shared, domain=public community-governed.

entity_count.description: MUST equal the length of the entities array.

relationship_count.description: MUST equal the length of the relationships array.

document_count.description: OPTIONAL. Total source documents compiled into this Stack.

connector_count.description: OPTIONAL. Total connected sources (Slack, Jira, etc.) attached to this Stack.

compilation_strategy.description: OPTIONAL. How entity descriptions were compiled. incremental=per-document sequential. global=two-phase with full domain vocabulary awareness. Consumers MAY use this to interpret description quality.

documents.description: Source documents compiled into this Stack with quality audit results. OPTIONAL but RECOMMENDED.

connectors.description: OPTIONAL. Connected sources attached to this Stack.

runs.description: Agent run records. Drives coverage awareness.

recommended_tools.description: OPTIONAL. MCP-compatible tool references. Informational only.

filters_applied.description: OPTIONAL. Present when this bundle is a filtered subset. Consumers MUST check this before assuming the bundle is the full Stack.

AKSSource.title: AKSSource
AKSSource.description: Traceability block on every entity and relationship. Records origin, model, verification, and pipeline.

document_id.description: UUID of the source document. Present when source_kind is document.

connector_id.description: UUID of the connector. Present when source_kind is connector. Exactly one of document_id or connector_id SHOULD be present.

source_kind.description: How this knowledge unit was produced.

extracted_at.description: Timestamp when the knowledge unit was extracted from its source.

verified.description: Whether a human has reviewed and confirmed this knowledge unit. Drives scope graduation.

AKSConnector.title: AKSConnector
AKSConnector.description: A connected data source attached to a Knowledge Stack.

provider.description: Connector provider identifier (slack, jira, github, notion, salesforce, database, custom).

label.description: OPTIONAL. Human-readable label for this connector instance.

mode.description: sync=data periodically ingested into compiled layer. live=data fetched at agent runtime.

last_synced_at.description: OPTIONAL. Timestamp of the most recent sync operation. Present only for sync-mode connectors.

status.description: OPTIONAL. Operational status: connected, syncing, or error.

duplicate_score.description: Similarity to existing content in the Stack, 0.0 (unique) to 1.0 (duplicate).

staleness_score.description: Estimated staleness of this document, 0.0 (current) to 1.0 (outdated).

quality_classification.description: Overall quality categorization of the document for compilation purposes.

contradiction_count.description: Number of contradictions detected between this document and the existing ontology.

contradiction_flags.description: Detailed list of specific contradictions, with existing and new claims and severity.

passed.description: Whether this document passed the quality audit.

recommendation.description: Suggested action for this document: proceed, review (human needed), or dismiss.

AKSDocument.title: AKSDocument
AKSDocument.description: A source document compiled into the Stack.

filename.description: Original filename of the source document.

ingested_at.description: Timestamp when the document was ingested into the Stack.

source_hash.description: OPTIONAL. SHA-256 hash of source content at ingestion. Implementations MAY use this for change detection to avoid redundant re-extraction.

truncated.description: OPTIONAL. True when source was truncated before extraction due to context window limits. Consumers SHOULD interpret entities from truncated sources with reduced confidence.

original_length.description: OPTIONAL. Character count before truncation. Present only when truncated is true.

audit.description: Quality audit results produced before ingestion. See AKSDocumentAudit.

AKSEntity.title: AKSEntity
AKSEntity.description: A compiled knowledge entity — a node in the knowledge graph. The description field reflects the entity's role within the full compiled domain, not just what one document says about it.

id.description: Stable identifier. Does not change when entity names are updated.

name.description: Human-readable display name. May change over time; entity id does not.

description.description: Compiled account of this entity within the context of the full domain. In well-compiled Stacks this is a synthesized account that knows about sibling entities — not a raw per-document extraction.

properties.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata specific to this entity. Domain-defined structure.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence. Increases as more source documents corroborate this entity.

contributing_documents.description: OPTIONAL. UUIDs of all source documents that contributed to this entity via compilation or consolidation. Grows as new documents are ingested. Used to generate sourced entity pages.

last_seen_at.description: OPTIONAL. Timestamp of the most recent document ingestion that mentioned or consolidated into this entity. Consumers MAY use this as a staleness signal. Does not affect confidence automatically — Stack owners decide what to do with stale entities.

source.description: Traceability block recording how this entity was produced. See AKSSource.

AKSRelationship.title: AKSRelationship
AKSRelationship.description: A typed directed relationship between two entities. Always references entity IDs, never names.

from_entity_id.description: Must reference an id present in the entities array.

to_entity_id.description: Must reference an id present in the entities array.

description.description: OPTIONAL. Prose describing the relationship in context.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence, 0.0 to 1.0. Increases as more sources corroborate the relationship.

source.description: Traceability block recording how this relationship was produced. See AKSSource.

AKSRun.title: AKSRun
AKSRun.description: An agent run record. Drives coverage awareness.

run_id.description: Stable UUID for this run record.

stack_id.description: UUID of the Stack this run queried.

aks_version.description: AKS spec version this run was produced under.

trigger.description: manual=person asked directly, auto=system fired, api=called via API.

query.description: OPTIONAL. The query text that initiated this run, if applicable.

traversal_path.description: Ordered entity names the agent traversed. The explicit reasoning path.

entities_used.description: Names of all entities the agent consulted during this run.

confidence.description: Agent self-reported confidence for this run: HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW.

source_type.description: OPTIONAL. What the agent drew from. Absent on v0.1.0 records; consumers SHOULD assume compiled.

origin.description: Whether this run was produced by an agent execution (run) or submitted directly (direct).

AKSEntityPage.title: AKSEntityPage
AKSEntityPage.description: The human-readable page for a compiled entity. Generated on demand from the knowledge graph — never stored independently.

entity_name.description: Name of the entity this page represents.

markdown.description: Full markdown content. Includes sourcing citations when contributing_documents is populated.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this page was synthesized from the graph.

source_entity_id.description: UUID of the AKSEntity this page was derived from.

graph_version.description: OPTIONAL. Hash or version token of the compiled graph state at generation. Consumers cache pages and invalidate when this changes.

source_type.description: OPTIONAL. compiled=derived entirely from compiled ontology. hybrid=also incorporates live connector data.

live_sources.description: OPTIONAL. Connector UUIDs that contributed live data to this page.

live_at.description: OPTIONAL. When live connector data was fetched. Distinct from generated_at.

AKSBackfeed.title: AKSBackfeed
AKSBackfeed.description: A knowledge unit submitted for backfeed into the Stack. Requires human review before absorption.

content.description: The content submitted for absorption into the Stack.

origin.description: run=produced by an agent run. direct=submitted without a run.

stack_id.description: UUID of the Stack this backfeed item is destined for.

flagged_by.description: OPTIONAL. Identifier of the user or system that flagged this content.

source_run_id.description: OPTIONAL. UUID of the agent run that produced this content, if origin is run.
